sloName: Read and write numbers up to 10,000
sloDescription: By the end of the sub-strand, the learner should be able to read and write numbers up to 10,000 in numerals and words
knowledge: Understand Read and write numbers up to 10,000
Recall key concepts of Whole Numbers
skills: Apply Whole Numbers concepts
Demonstrate understanding of Read and write numbers up to 10,000

competencies.name: Communication and Collaboration
competencies.description: Learners work together effectively and share ideas clearly

competencies.name: Critical Thinking and Problem Solving
competencies.description: Learners analyze situations and develop creative solutions

values.name: Respect
values.description: Learners show respect for others, ideas, and diversity

values.name: Responsibility
values.description: Learners take ownership of their actions and learning

pcis.name: Financial Literacy
pcis.description: Understanding the value and responsible use of money

introduction: Teacher introduces Whole Numbers (5 min). Learners share what they know about the topic.
lessonDevelopment: Teacher explains Read and write numbers up to 10,000 with examples (25 min). Learners participate in: Use number cards to practice reading and writing numbers.
conclusion: Teacher summarizes key points (5 min). Learners reflect on learning.
assessment: Quick assessment (5 min): Ask learners questions to assess understanding verbally

knowledge: Understand Describe types of motion
Recall key concepts of Motion
skills: Apply Motion concepts
Demonstrate understanding of Describe types of motion
introduction: Comprehensive introduction to Motion (10 min). Teacher uses multimedia/real objects. Learners engage in discussion and pre-assessment.
lessonDevelopment: Detailed explanation of Describe types of motion with multiple examples (24 min). Learners participate in: various guided activities.
extendedActivity: Extended group work and differentiated activities (19 min): Learners explore Motion through projects, experiments, or research. Teacher provides individualized support.
conclusion: Comprehensive review and reflection (10 min). Group presentations, peer feedback, and teacher summary.
assessment: Comprehensive assessment (11 min): Multiple methods - oral questions, written tasks, practical demonstrations, peer assessment
